meaning: n.[希神](环绕地狱的河)冥河
examples: Oceanides Thetis, Achilles' mother, grasped his heel to soak him in the Styx River after he was born.
Im not the Styx to embrace you nine times.
When she had almost given up hope she sat by the River Styx.
Standing too long in the middle of the financial equivalent of the river Styx can have severe consequences.
The process for seeking approval from federal agencies is so disjointed and slow that pushing a line over a national park or river might as well be crossing the Styx.
